title: geum bulgaricum
intro: Geum bulgaricum, also known as Chinese goldenseal or goldenseal, is a perennial plant native to China and the Himalayas. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its berberine content, which has antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. Geum bulgaricum has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, as well as to support cardiovascular health and immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
